summary: Comprehensive QA testing of SAMSON Church Management System. Login flow, portal navigation, Library/Watch pages, Admin dashboard all tested. 12/13 backend tests pass. Video player modal works. Mobile responsive design verified.

minor.issue: Returns 487 members instead of 50,000+ as expected by mega-church scale test
minor.note: Test expectation mismatch - stats endpoint returns seeded demo data correctly

details: Quick actions: Give Now, My Groups, Upcoming Events
Hero section with auto-rotating featured content
Carousels: New This Week, Popular Series, Faith & Spirituality, Personal Growth
MasterClass-style design with pure black background
Filter sidebar with accordions (Format, My Content, Duration)
Video player modal opens on play button click
Modal opens on play button click
Shows group name, type, time, location, member count
Event cards with date, name, location, time
Stats cards: Total Members 487, Active Groups 12, MTD Giving $24,750
Portal home mobile with hamburger menu

results.failure_reason: test_dashboard_stats_scale - expects 50,000+ members but gets 487 (demo seed data)

critical_code_review_comments: Watch and Library page data is HARDCODED in frontend components (no API calls)
Dashboard stats endpoint is MOCKED (returns fixed demo values)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all portal pages load and function correctly)

seed_data_creation: No new data created - using existing seeded demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working. Login flows for member/admin work correctly. Portal pages (Home, Watch, Library, Groups, Events, Give, Me) all load. Library page has MasterClass-style design with 12 sermon cards. Watch page has hero with auto-rotation and carousels. Video player modal works. Admin dashboard shows stats, charts, and activity feed. Mobile responsive with bottom navigation. Dashboard stats API is MOCKED. Watch/Library content is HARDCODED in frontend.
